mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post p WHERE p.category_id = 2
AND p.status IN
#{status}
AND p.status IN (0, 1)

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.start_point, p.end_point, p.price, p.item_info, p.contact_info, p.status, p.create_time, p.image1, p.image2, p.image3, u.username, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.category_id = 2
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET status = 5 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND category_id = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_task ( task_no, post_id, creator_id, acceptor_id, task_type, title, description, amount, start_location, end_location, remark, task_status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{postId}, #{creatorId}, #{acceptorId}, '跑腿服务', #{title}, #{description}, #{amount}, #{startLocation}, #{endLocation}, CONCAT( '{"contactInfo":"', IFNULL(#{contactInfo}, ''), '",', '"images":[', IF(#{image1} IS NOT NULL, CONCAT('"', #{image1}, '"'), ''), IF(#{image1} IS NOT NULL AND #{image2} IS NOT NULL, ',', ''), IF(#{image2} IS NOT NULL, CONCAT('"', #{image2}, '"'), ''), IF((#{image1} IS NOT NULL OR #{image2} IS NOT NULL) AND #{image3} IS NOT NULL, ',', ''), IF(#{image3} IS NOT NULL, CONCAT('"', #{image3}, '"'), ''), ']}' ), 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT tt.task_id as taskId, tt.task_no as taskNo, tt.post_id as postId, tt.creator_id as creatorId, tt.acceptor_id as acceptorId, tt.task_type as taskType, tt.title, tt.description, tt.amount, tt.start_location as startLocation, tt.end_location as endLocation, tt.remark, tt.task_status as taskStatus, tt.create_time as createTime, u.username as acceptorUsername, u.avatar as acceptorAvatar, COALESCE(p.contact_info, '') as contactInfo, CASE WHEN p.image1 IS NOT NULL AND p.image1 != '' THEN p.image1 ELSE NULL END as image1, CASE WHEN p.image2 IS NOT NULL AND p.image2 != '' THEN p.image2 ELSE NULL END as image2, CASE WHEN p.image3 IS NOT NULL AND p.image3 != '' THEN p.image3 ELSE NULL END as image3 FROM trade_task tt LEFT JOIN user u ON tt.acceptor_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post p ON tt.post_id = p.post_id WHERE tt.post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1

SELECT tt.task_id as taskId, tt.task_no as taskNo, tt.post_id as postId, tt.creator_id as creatorId, tt.acceptor_id as acceptorId, tt.task_type as taskType, tt.title, tt.description, tt.amount, tt.start_location as startLocation, tt.end_location as endLocation, tt.remark, tt.task_status as taskStatus, tt.create_time as createTime, u.username as creatorUsername, u.avatar as creatorAvatar, COALESCE(p.contact_info, '') as contactInfo, CASE WHEN p.image1 IS NOT NULL AND p.image1 != '' THEN p.image1 ELSE NULL END as image1, CASE WHEN p.image2 IS NOT NULL AND p.image2 != '' THEN p.image2 ELSE NULL END as image2, CASE WHEN p.image3 IS NOT NULL AND p.image3 != '' THEN p.image3 ELSE NULL END as image3, p.status as status FROM trade_task tt LEFT JOIN user u ON tt.creator_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post p ON tt.post_id = p.post_id WHERE tt.acceptor_id = #{acceptorId} AND tt.task_type = '跑腿服务' ORDER BY tt.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET status = 3 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND category_id = 2
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.start_point, p.end_point, p.price, p.item_info, p.contact_info, p.status, p.create_time, p.image1, p.image2, p.image3, u.username, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
